message:
test(labruntime): port 15 restore_scrollback + restore_process tests (ft-22x4r)

Port all 8 #[tokio::test] from restore_scrollback.rs and all 7 from
restore_process.rs to asupersync RuntimeFixture. Covers scrollback
injection (single/multi-pane, chunking, truncation, guard lifecycle)
and process launch execution (shell/agent/skip/manual plans).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
